_x000d_
Issue 1: Notification Panel Auto-Expands on Touch During Notification Arrival: When a new notification arrives, if the user touches the screen simultaneously (even outside the notification area), the notification panel automatically expands downward without intentional swipe or tap on the status bar. This behavior is unintended and disrupts normal interaction.  _x000d_
_x000d_
_x000d_
Issue 2: WhatsApp Notifications Display Identical Sender Profile Picture: When receiving multiple WhatsApp message notifications from different contacts, all notifications incorrectly display the same sender profile picture (DP) — typically the DP of the most recent or first sender — instead of showing each contact’s respective profile image. This causes confusion in identifying the actual sender at a glance. _x000d_
rows.AI Insight: The notification panel automatically expands when the screen is touched, even outside the notification area, disrupting normal user interaction.
